Package org.eventb.ui.prover.tests

Class TestPredicateHeight

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.ui.prover.tests.TestPredicateHeight
public class TestPredicateHeight extends Object
Ensures that predicate heights are correctly computed by the prover UI. There is one test method per Predicate sub-class.
